disclaimer: Educational only. Award announcements are not revenue, not stock recommendations, and not financial advice. Amounts and dates are approximate from public sources; verify at the source URL.
source_note: Curated high-signal NASA / cislunar-relevant awards mapped to public tickers where possible. Maintained in-repo; not a live procurement feed.

awards.title: CLPS lunar delivery task order (IM-1 / Odysseus class)
awards.amount_note: approx task-order class value; not full company backlog
awards.notes: Early CLPS award that put LUNR in the cislunar narrative. Educational: task orders stack over time.

awards.title: CLPS polar delivery (IM-2 / PRIME-1 era)
awards.notes: Polar/ISRU-adjacent payload story — power + volatiles narrative fuel for the sim.

awards.title: CLPS lunar lander delivery (Blue Ghost class)
awards.notes: Competing commercial lander cadence — multiple providers reduce single-point failure risk.

awards.title: CLPS Task Order 2A (Peregrine lander)
awards.notes: Private (unlisted) CLPS provider — included so the radar is not ticker-only.

awards.title: Human Landing System (HLS) — Option A / Artemis lunar lander
awards.amount_note: approx base Option A class; options & milestones vary
awards.notes: Largest single narrative line for crewed lunar landing logistics. Educational only.

awards.title: HLS Sustaining Lunar Development (competing lander architecture)
awards.notes: Second lander path — competition & redundancy theme. BA listed as public proxy among industrial partners; not exclusive attribution.

awards.title: Orion spacecraft production / exploration systems (crew vehicle)
awards.amount_note: illustrative multi-year production class; not a single invoice
awards.notes: Crew capsule backbone for Artemis. Long-horizon prime contractor economics.

awards.title: Space Launch System (core stage / exploration launch)
awards.amount_note: illustrative core-stage production class over years
awards.notes: Heavy-lift cadence constraint for Artemis. Educational production-class figure.

awards.title: SLS solid rocket boosters / exploration launch elements
awards.notes: Booster industrial base for SLS — primes beyond pure-play lunar startups.

awards.title: Gateway Power and Propulsion Element (PPE) contributions
awards.amount_note: approx PPE award class (heritage public figure)
awards.notes: Cislunar power + electric propulsion narrative. Corporate structure may change; ticker is educational proxy.

awards.title: Commercial Resupply (Cygnus) — ISS logistics heritage
awards.notes: Earth-orbit logistics practice — operational cadence that transfers culturally to cislunar ops.

awards.title: NASA Venture-Class / science launch services (Electron-class cadence)
awards.notes: Small-launch cadence for science & tech demos — not HLS-scale, still real NASA demand.

awards.title: ISS / in-space manufacturing & tech demo task orders
awards.notes: In-space manufacturing as stepping stone to lunar ISRU storytelling.

awards.title: Earth science commercial data / smallsat constellation services
awards.notes: Not lunar surface — still part of the space economy stack Lunara tracks.

awards.title: SBIR/STTR example — lunar ISRU / power tech (illustrative seed)
awards.amount_note: Phase II class example — not one company
awards.notes: Placeholder educational card for how early ISRU tech is funded before prime-scale awards.
